tags.note:maxspeed: Counterintuitively, the maxspeed on this on-ramp is 130 km/h instead of the lower speed posted on the main road due to it having only a G1 (start motorway) sign at the start

tags.note: Crossing building is on purpose, do not change. The building geometry is bad and is in the process of being fixed. Please leave this up to the local community members who do the building imports, such as me.
